summary: Iteration 30 - Mobile PWA App Testing Complete. All backend APIs pass (16/17 tests, 1 skipped). All 4 role logins (Parent, Coach, Player, Management) work correctly with Phone+OTP auth. Frontend mobile UI verified with bottom navigation, schedule, news, profile pages. Admin CMS regression check passed.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom nav tabs - requires force=True or JS click to interact. This is an Emergent platform badge, not app code issue.

success_rate.backend: 94% (16/17 tests passed, 1 skipped - no events/children for availability test)

test_credentials.otp_note: OTP is SIMULATED - code appears in otp_debug field of API response and in blue debug box on frontend

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA app at /app route fully tested. Phone+OTP auth with 4 roles (Parent, Coach, Player, Management). OTP is simulated - get code from otp_debug in API response or blue debug box on frontend. Phone numbers should be sent WITHOUT +357 prefix. Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/mobile_auth.py. Frontend components in /app/frontend/src/mobile/. Admin CMS at /admin/login still works. All UI in Greek.

mobile_otp_request.details: POST /api/mobile/auth/request-otp works for all 4 phone numbers. Returns otp_debug in simulated mode. Role detection works correctly.

mobile_otp_verify.details: POST /api/mobile/auth/verify-otp returns token and user on correct code. Returns 400 on wrong code.

mobile_auth_me.details: GET /api/mobile/auth/me returns user data with valid token. Returns 401 without token.

parent_dashboard.details: GET /api/mobile/parent/dashboard returns children, events, financial_records, attendance, announcements.

coach_dashboard.details: GET /api/mobile/coach/dashboard returns teams, groups, players, events, announcements, training_sessions.

player_dashboard.details: GET /api/mobile/player/dashboard returns player, stats (goals, assists, appearances, minutes), events, announcements.

management_dashboard.details: GET /api/mobile/management/dashboard returns teams, groups, player_count, financial (total_revenue, total_pending, total_overdue), announcements.

frontend_login_flow.details: Phone input, OTP request, debug code display, OTP entry, auto-submit, redirect to dashboard all work.

frontend_navigation.details: Bottom nav tabs (Home, Schedule, News, Profile) work for all roles. Role-specific tabs (Team, Stats, Financial) appear correctly.

frontend_logout.details: Logout button on profile page works, redirects to /app/login.

admin_cms_regression.details: Admin CMS at /admin/login still works with credentials: username='Lefteria FC', password='L3ft3r1@FC#2024$Secure!'
